subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in the One, the All-Informed, whose name was mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One in this exalted station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالفرد الخبیر الذی حضر اسمه لدی المظلوم فی هذا المقام الرفیع
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
